whatAgentDoes.subtitle: Not a robot reading scripts. An agent that knows your business and talks like a person.

items.question: What happens if I exceed the included minutes?
items.answer: Additional minutes are billed at €0.15/minute. We notify you in advance when you're approaching your limit.

items.question: Are there long-term contracts?
items.answer: No. You pay monthly and cancel anytime. No penalties, no questions asked.

items.question: Is there a discount for annual billing?
items.answer: Yes. With annual billing, you get 2 months free — pay for 10, get 12.

items.question: What does the setup fee include?
items.answer: Complete configuration: voice customization, dialogue setup, calendar integration, testing, and launch.

items.question: Can I change my plan later?
items.answer: Anytime. Upgrades are instant. Downgrades take effect from the following month.

cta.title: Ready to stop losing calls?
cta.subtitle: Setup in 3-5 days. No long contracts. The first client you win back pays for the first month.

howItWorks.title: How Our Voice Agent Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first call to first appointment — in 5 simple steps.

steps.title: Contact our team
steps.description: Fill out the form or give us a call. It takes 2 minutes.

steps.title: We discuss your business

steps.title: We configure your agent

steps.title: We test together
steps.description: You call the agent, check how it responds, we adjust whatever's needed. We don't launch until you're satisfied.

steps.title: Your agent takes over calls
steps.description: Every call answered automatically. Appointments booked in your calendar. Daily reports sent to your email.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We're a team from Romania helping local businesses stop losing clients over the phone.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: A team of AI and automation specialists based in Romania. We built voice agents because we saw a problem no one was solving: good businesses losing clients simply because they couldn't answer the phone.

whyWeExist.title: Why We Exist
whyWeExist.description: 78% of small businesses in Romania lose clients due to missed calls. We're not talking about technology for its own sake. We're talking about money slipping through your fingers every single day.

ourApproach.title: Our Approach
ourApproach.description: We don't sell 'innovative solutions.' We measure results. How many calls did the agent handle? How many appointments did it book? How much did you save? If the numbers don't look good, you don't pay.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Clear pricing, detailed reports, no hidden costs.

items.title: Accountability
items.description: If the agent doesn't perform, we fix it or you don't pay.

items.title: Simplicity
items.description: Simple setup, simple interface, clear results.

items.title: Local Partnership
items.description: We're here, in Romania. We speak your language. We understand your market.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about your business. We respond within 24 hours.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our AI voice agent.

items.question: What is an AI voice agent?
items.answer: It's a system that answers the phone for you. It has natural conversations, answers questions, and books appointments — like a receptionist, but available 24/7 and never in a bad mood.

items.question: Will clients know they're talking to a robot?
items.answer: The agent's voice is natural and fluent. Most people don't realize it. And honestly — an answer at 10 PM beats a voicemail that nobody checks.

items.question: What languages does the agent speak?
items.answer: Native Romanian and English. It can switch automatically based on what language the caller uses.

items.question: Can the agent transfer the call to me?
items.answer: Yes. The agent can transfer the call to you or a team member at any point in the conversation.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: 3–5 business days. This includes voice customization, dialogue setup, calendar integration, and testing.

items.question: What do I need to do?
items.answer: Very little. Tell us about your business, give us calendar access, and validate the agent before we launch. We handle the rest.

items.question: What systems does it integrate with?
items.answer: Google Calendar, Outlook, Calendly, and most popular CRMs. Got a specific system? Let's talk.

items.question: Are there hidden costs?
items.answer: No. The price includes everything on the pricing page. The only exception: extra minutes beyond your plan limit, at €0.15/minute.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. No long-term contracts, no cancellation fees. You pay monthly, you leave monthly.

items.question: Is there a trial period?
items.answer: We offer a free personalized demo. After that, the first month comes with a money-back guarantee — if you're not satisfied, we refund you.

items.question: Is my clients' data safe?
items.answer: Yes. We are GDPR compliant. All data is encrypted, securely stored, and never shared with third parties.

items.question: Where is the data stored?
items.answer: On servers in the European Union, fully compliant with GDPR.

items.question: Are calls recorded?
items.answer: Only on Professional and Premium plans, with your consent. Recordings are encrypted and only you can access them.

clinici-dentare.name: Dental Clinics
clinici-dentare.shortDesc: Automatic appointment booking, treatment FAQs, after-hours emergencies.
clinici-dentare.hero: Every missed call is a missed appointment. Your agent answers even when your hands are in a patient's mouth.
clinici-dentare.scenarioIntro: It's Tuesday at 3 PM. You're in the middle of a root canal. The phone rings at reception — but the receptionist is on lunch break.
clinici-dentare.description: Dental clinics lose an average of 35% of incoming calls. Each missed call is a patient who goes to a competitor. Our voice agent answers 24/7, handles bookings, answers questions about procedures, and manages emergencies — so you can focus on actual dentistry.

scenarios.title: Emergency call at 9 PM
scenarios.description: A patient has a broken tooth. The agent collects their details, assesses urgency, and schedules an emergency appointment for the next morning — all without waking you up.

scenarios.title: New patient asking about pricing
scenarios.description: The agent explains treatment options, gives pricing ranges, answers common questions about procedures, and books a first consultation.

scenarios.title: Existing patient rescheduling
scenarios.description: Patient needs to move their appointment. The agent checks availability, reschedules directly in your calendar, and sends a confirmation SMS.

beforeAfter.before: Patients go to the clinic next door
beforeAfter.after: Patient booked before they even think about calling someone else

beforeAfter.before: No one to handle evening emergencies

features.title: 24/7 appointment booking
features.description: Patients can book, reschedule, or cancel at any time — even Sunday night.

features.title: Treatment FAQ
features.description: Answers questions about implants, braces, whitening, extraction — in plain language.

features.title: Emergency triage
features.description: Identifies urgent cases and prioritizes them in your schedule.

features.title: Appointment reminders
features.description: Automatically reminds patients 24 hours before their appointment to reduce no-shows.

objections.question: What if the agent doesn't know the answer to a medical question?
objections.answer: The agent is trained on your specific services and treatments. For anything outside its scope, it collects the caller's details and tells them you'll call back. It never guesses.

objections.question: Can it handle my specific booking system?
objections.answer: We integrate with Google Calendar, Outlook, Calendly, and most dental practice management software. If you use something specific, tell us — we'll make it work.

objections.question: What about GDPR for patient data?
objections.answer: All data is encrypted, stored on EU servers, and fully GDPR compliant. Patient information is only accessible to you.

clinici-dentare.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
clinici-dentare.roiDescription: With 15 calls per day and 35% missed, you're losing roughly 5 potential patients daily. At €380 average value, that's €1,900 per day walking out the door.
clinici-dentare.roiResult: Recovering even 3 of those 5 missed patients per day pays for the agent many times over.
clinici-dentare.pricingDescription: Most dental clinics start on Professional. You get direct calendar integration, call recordings, and detailed monthly reports.
clinici-dentare.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
clinici-dentare.demoDescription: Listen to a real demo call simulating a new patient booking a consultation at a dental clinic.

cabinete-medicale.name: Medical Offices
cabinete-medicale.shortDesc: Patient scheduling, phone triage, test results information.
cabinete-medicale.hero: Patients call. You're in consultation. Who answers?
cabinete-medicale.scenarioIntro: It's Wednesday at 11 AM. You have 3 back-to-back consultations. The phone rings 5 times.
cabinete-medicale.description: Medical offices receive a high volume of calls — appointments, test results, prescription renewals, urgent questions. When you're in consultation, every unanswered call is a patient experience that could have been better. Our agent handles routine calls so your team can focus on care.

scenarios.title: Patient calling about test results
scenarios.description: The agent explains which results are available, confirms the patient's identity, and schedules a follow-up consultation to discuss the findings with the doctor.

scenarios.title: New patient requesting first appointment
scenarios.description: The agent collects basic information, explains what to bring to the first visit, and books the appointment directly in your calendar.

scenarios.title: Prescription renewal request
scenarios.description: The agent notes the request, confirms patient details, and schedules a short consultation or flags it for the doctor's review — per your protocol.

beforeAfter.after: Every new patient captured and booked

cabinete-medicale.featuresTitle: What your medical office agent does

features.title: Appointment scheduling
features.description: Books, reschedules, and cancels appointments directly in your calendar.

features.title: Basic phone triage
features.description: Identifies urgency and routes calls appropriately — urgent cases get flagged immediately.

features.title: FAQ handling
features.description: Answers questions about opening hours, services, location, what to bring, insurance, and more.

features.title: Patient callback requests
features.description: When the doctor needs to call back, the agent collects all relevant details and queues the request.

objections.question: Can it handle medical questions safely?
objections.answer: The agent only handles administrative and informational tasks. It never gives medical advice. For medical questions, it tells patients to come in or call emergency services if urgent.

objections.question: What about patient confidentiality?
objections.answer: All data is encrypted and GDPR compliant. The agent only collects what's necessary for booking — name, phone, reason for call. Nothing more.

objections.question: We already have a receptionist. Why add this?
objections.answer: The agent handles overflow when your receptionist is on another call, on break, or after hours. It's not a replacement — it's backup that never takes a day off.

cabinete-medicale.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
cabinete-medicale.roiDescription: With 20 calls per day and 40% missed, you're missing 8 potential patients daily. At €250 per consultation, that's €2,000 per day in lost revenue.
cabinete-medicale.roiResult: Recovering even 4 of those 8 missed patients per day covers the agent cost multiple times over.
cabinete-medicale.pricingDescription: Medical offices typically choose Professional for direct calendar integration and detailed call reporting.
cabinete-medicale.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
cabinete-medicale.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a patient booking a consultation at a medical office.

saloane-de-frumusete.name: Beauty Salons
saloane-de-frumusete.shortDesc: Non-stop bookings, automatic cancellations and rescheduling.
saloane-de-frumusete.hero: Your clients call when your hands are busy. Our agent books them in your place.
saloane-de-frumusete.scenarioIntro: It's Saturday at 10 AM. You have 3 clients, and the phone keeps ringing.
saloane-de-frumusete.description: Beauty salons lose almost half their incoming calls — hands are always busy, focus is always on the client in the chair. Our agent answers every call, books appointments, handles cancellations, and sends reminders. So you never lose a booking because you were in the middle of a treatment.

scenarios.title: Client calling to book a Saturday appointment
scenarios.description: The agent checks availability, confirms the service and stylist preference, books the slot, and sends a confirmation message.

scenarios.title: Last-minute cancellation
scenarios.description: Client cancels for tomorrow morning. The agent frees the slot, updates the calendar, and can offer it to clients on a waiting list.

scenarios.title: New client asking about services and prices
scenarios.description: The agent explains services, gives price ranges, and offers to book a first appointment — turning an inquiry into a booking.

beforeAfter.after: Every call answered without interrupting your work

beforeAfter.before: Clients book at salons that answer faster

beforeAfter.after: Automatic reminders reduce no-shows by up to 40%
Bookings coming in around the clock

saloane-de-frumusete.featuresTitle: What your beauty salon agent does

features.title: 24/7 booking
features.description: Clients book any time — even at midnight before a Saturday appointment.

features.title: Service menu and pricing
features.description: Answers questions about treatments, durations, and prices without you lifting a finger.

features.title: Cancellation and rescheduling
features.description: Handles changes automatically and keeps your calendar accurate.

features.title: Appointment reminders
features.description: Sends SMS reminders 24 hours before to cut no-shows.

objections.question: Clients want to talk to a real person — will they mind?
objections.answer: Most clients care about getting a confirmed booking quickly. The agent does exactly that, naturally and politely. And it's always available.

objections.question: What if a client has a complex request?
objections.answer: The agent handles standard bookings and FAQs. For complex cases — special events, group bookings — it notes the details and flags them for you to call back.

objections.question: We're a small salon. Is this worth it?
objections.answer: If you're missing 5–6 calls a week, you're losing roughly €400–500 in bookings monthly. The Starter plan is €299/month. The math works.

saloane-de-frumusete.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
saloane-de-frumusete.roiDescription: With 12 calls per day and 45% missed, you're losing 5–6 bookings daily. At €75 average, that's €375–450 per day in missed revenue.
saloane-de-frumusete.roiResult: Recovering just 3 bookings a day more than covers the monthly cost.
saloane-de-frumusete.pricingDescription: Most beauty salons start with Starter. It covers all the basics — 24/7 answering, booking, FAQs — at the lowest price.
saloane-de-frumusete.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
saloane-de-frumusete.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a client booking a hair appointment at a beauty salon.

firme-de-avocatura.name: Law Firms
firme-de-avocatura.shortDesc: New case intake, detail collection, consultation scheduling.
firme-de-avocatura.hero: When someone calls a lawyer, they're in crisis. If you don't answer, they call the next one.
firme-de-avocatura.scenarioIntro: It's Thursday at 11 PM. An accident victim calls. You're at home.
firme-de-avocatura.description: Legal clients call when they're in trouble — after an accident, a business dispute, a family crisis. They need to talk to someone now. If your firm doesn't answer, they don't wait. They call the next lawyer on Google. Our agent captures every lead, collects case details, and books consultations — day or night.

scenarios.title: Urgent call after a road accident
scenarios.description: The agent collects all relevant details — date, location, injuries, parties involved — and schedules an urgent consultation for the next morning.

scenarios.title: New client asking about legal services
scenarios.description: The agent explains practice areas, gives a general overview of the consultation process, and books an initial meeting.

scenarios.title: Existing client with a case update question
scenarios.description: The agent notes the inquiry, confirms the client's details, and schedules a callback from the attorney — keeping the client informed and calm.

beforeAfter.after: Every call answered, every potential client captured

beforeAfter.before: High-value cases going to competing firms
beforeAfter.after: Lead captured before they hang up

beforeAfter.before: Staff spending time on intake calls

stats.label: single case pays for months of service

firme-de-avocatura.featuresTitle: What your law firm agent does

features.title: 24/7 lead capture
features.description: Answers after hours and weekends — exactly when clients in crisis call most.

features.title: Structured intake
features.description: Collects case details systematically so you have everything you need before the consultation.

features.title: Consultation scheduling
features.description: Books directly in your calendar or collects a preferred time and confirms with you.

features.title: Practice area information
features.description: Explains your areas of practice, fees, and consultation process clearly and consistently.

objections.question: Legal matters are sensitive. Can an AI handle this?
objections.answer: The agent handles intake and scheduling, not legal advice. It's disciplined about what it says — it collects facts, books meetings, and never offers opinions on legal matters.

objections.question: What if the client's case is unusual?
objections.answer: The agent collects whatever information the caller provides, flags the call as a priority, and ensures you call back. No case slips through.

objections.question: Is a missed call really that costly for a law firm?
objections.answer: One missed case at €1,500 average value costs more than 5 months of the Starter plan. Every unanswered call is a real financial decision.

firme-de-avocatura.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
firme-de-avocatura.roiDescription: With 8 calls per day and 30% missed, that's roughly 2–3 potential clients daily who don't get through. At €1,500 average case value, even one recovered case per week justifies the entire year.
firme-de-avocatura.roiResult: One recovered case per week covers the full annual cost of the Professional plan.
firme-de-avocatura.pricingDescription: Law firms typically choose Professional or Premium for detailed call recordings, CRM integration, and priority support.
firme-de-avocatura.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
firme-de-avocatura.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a new client contacting a law firm after a road accident.

agentii-imobiliare.name: Real Estate Agencies
agentii-imobiliare.shortDesc: 24/7 lead capture, viewing scheduling, automatic follow-up.
agentii-imobiliare.hero: You're at a showing. The phone rings. A seller wants to list. You can't answer. The commission just walked away.
agentii-imobiliare.scenarioIntro: It's Tuesday at 4 PM. You're at a showing with a buyer. The phone rings — a property owner wants to sell.
agentii-imobiliare.description: Real estate agents are always on the move — showings, negotiations, site visits. Leads call when they're ready to act, and they don't wait. Our agent captures every seller inquiry, schedules viewings, and follows up automatically. So you never lose a commission because you were busy closing another deal.

scenarios.title: Seller calling to list their property
scenarios.description: The agent collects property details, location, asking price, and availability for a valuation visit — and books you in.

scenarios.title: Buyer calling about a listed property
scenarios.description: The agent provides property details, answers common questions, and schedules a viewing directly in your calendar.

scenarios.title: Lead calling after seeing a portal listing
scenarios.description: The agent qualifies the lead, captures contact information, and books a call-back or viewing before they move on to another listing.

beforeAfter.before: Leads calling while you're at a showing
Hot sellers going to the agency that answers
beforeAfter.after: Seller booked before they call your competitor
24/7 availability — when buyers and sellers are actually browsing

stats.label: recovered deal pays for a full year

agentii-imobiliare.featuresTitle: What your real estate agent does

features.title: Lead capture 24/7
features.description: Captures seller and buyer inquiries at any hour — portal listings generate calls at all times.

features.title: Viewing scheduling
features.description: Books viewings directly in your calendar with all relevant property and client details.

features.title: Property information
features.description: Answers questions about listed properties — price, location, size, availability.

features.title: Automatic follow-up
features.description: Schedules callbacks and follow-up calls so no lead goes cold.

objections.question: Real estate is personal — clients want a real agent.
objections.answer: The agent's job is to capture the lead and book the meeting. The relationship starts with you. The agent just makes sure the lead doesn't go to someone else while you're unavailable.

objections.question: What if the caller has complex questions about a property?
objections.answer: For standard questions it answers directly. For specifics it doesn't have, it collects the caller's details and schedules a callback from you.

objections.question: I already use a CRM. Will this work with it?
objections.answer: We integrate with most real estate CRMs. Every call is logged with caller details and notes — ready in your system when you check.

agentii-imobiliare.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
agentii-imobiliare.roiDescription: With 18 calls per day and 35% missed, you're missing 6–7 potential leads daily. At €3,500 average commission, even one recovered deal per month more than pays for the entire year.
agentii-imobiliare.roiResult: One recovered deal per month covers 12 months of Premium service.
agentii-imobiliare.pricingDescription: Real estate agencies typically choose Professional for CRM integration and detailed lead tracking.
agentii-imobiliare.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
agentii-imobiliare.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a property seller calling a real estate agency.

service-auto.name: Auto Service
service-auto.shortDesc: Repair bookings, breakdown emergencies, pricing information.
service-auto.hero: You're under a car, hands covered in oil. The phone rings. Whoever answers first wins.
service-auto.scenarioIntro: It's Monday morning. You have 3 cars on the lift. The phone rings 8 times.
service-auto.description: Auto service shops are loud, hands-on environments. You can't answer the phone from under a car. But clients who call about a breakdown or service need an answer now — or they call the next shop. Our agent captures every inquiry, books service appointments, and handles pricing questions while you focus on the work.

scenarios.title: Client with a breakdown on the roadside
scenarios.description: The agent collects the location, vehicle details, and nature of the problem — books an emergency slot or arranges a tow, based on your service protocols.

scenarios.title: Client calling for a service booking
scenarios.description: The agent checks availability, confirms the service type and vehicle, and books the appointment directly in your schedule.

scenarios.title: Client asking for repair estimate
scenarios.description: The agent provides price ranges for common services, explains what's included, and suggests booking an inspection for a precise quote.

beforeAfter.before: Phone ignored while working on cars
beforeAfter.after: Every call answered, no job interrupted

beforeAfter.before: Breakdown clients calling the next shop
No one to answer pricing questions

service-auto.featuresTitle: What your auto service agent does

features.title: Service booking
features.description: Books maintenance and repair appointments directly in your schedule.

features.title: Emergency handling
features.description: Captures breakdown details and coordinates urgent responses per your protocols.

features.title: Pricing information
features.description: Provides price ranges for common services — oil changes, tires, brakes, inspections.

features.title: Vehicle and service FAQs
features.description: Answers common questions about your shop, services offered, and turnaround times.

objections.question: Technical questions about cars are complex — can the agent handle them?
objections.answer: The agent handles booking and standard FAQs. For diagnostic questions, it collects the details and flags the call for a technician callback. It doesn't pretend to diagnose.

objections.question: We have irregular hours and seasonal peaks. Can it adjust?
objections.answer: Yes. Your agent reflects your actual schedule and can be updated anytime. During peak season, it handles higher call volumes without any change in cost.

objections.question: Is it worth it for a smaller shop?
objections.answer: If you're missing 4 calls a day at €320 average, that's over €1,200 in daily potential revenue walking out. The Starter plan costs €299/month.

service-auto.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
service-auto.roiDescription: With 10 calls per day and 40% missed, you're losing 4 potential bookings daily. At €320 average repair value, that's €1,280 per day in unrealized revenue.
service-auto.roiResult: Recovering just 1 repair booking per day covers the monthly plan cost many times over.
service-auto.pricingDescription: Most auto service shops start with Starter or Professional depending on call volume.
service-auto.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
service-auto.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a client booking a car service appointment.

frizerii-barbershop.name: Barbershops
frizerii-barbershop.hero: A client calls to book. You're cutting someone's hair. The phone rings out.
frizerii-barbershop.scenarioIntro: It's Friday at 5 PM. Everyone wants a weekend appointment. You've got scissors in hand.
frizerii-barbershop.description: Barbershops run on bookings. Miss a call and that client books somewhere else — or just walks in somewhere else. Our agent handles all booking calls while you focus on the cut. It books, reschedules, and reminds clients so your calendar stays full and your chair stays busy.

scenarios.title: Client calling to book for the weekend
scenarios.description: The agent checks availability, confirms the barber preference, books the slot, and sends a confirmation.

scenarios.title: Regular client wants the same time next week
scenarios.description: The agent books the recurring slot, confirms it, and sets up an automatic reminder for the day before.

scenarios.title: New client asking about services and prices
scenarios.description: The agent explains services — cuts, beard, color — gives pricing, and offers to book a first appointment.

beforeAfter.before: Regular clients going elsewhere when you don't answer

features.title: Instant booking
features.description: Clients book in under a minute — while you're still cutting.

features.title: Barber preference
features.description: Asks which barber they prefer and books with the right person.

features.title: Rebooking regulars
features.description: Automatically suggests the next appointment when a booking is confirmed.

features.title: Reminders
features.description: SMS the day before to cut no-shows and last-minute cancellations.

objections.question: My clients are used to calling me directly. Will they accept this?
objections.answer: The agent sounds natural and gets the job done fast. Most clients just want to confirm a slot. Once they book easily the first time, they stop caring who answered.

objections.question: I only have one barber. Is this overkill?
objections.answer: Single-chair shops actually benefit most — you're always cutting and never free to answer. The agent pays for itself with just 7–8 extra bookings per month.

objections.question: What if I'm fully booked?
objections.answer: The agent tells callers you're fully booked, offers the next available slot, and asks if they want to be added to a waiting list.

frizerii-barbershop.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
frizerii-barbershop.roiDescription: With 8 calls per day and 50% missed, you're losing 4 bookings daily. At €45 average, that's €180 per day — or roughly €3,600 per month in unrealized revenue.
frizerii-barbershop.roiResult: Recovering just 7 bookings per month covers the entire Starter plan cost.
frizerii-barbershop.pricingDescription: Barbershops almost always start with Starter — it covers all you need at the lowest price.
frizerii-barbershop.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
frizerii-barbershop.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a client booking a haircut at a barbershop.

hoteluri-hospitality.name: Hotels & Hospitality
hoteluri-hospitality.hero: A guest calls at 2 AM asking about check-in. The front desk is busy.
hoteluri-hospitality.scenarioIntro: It's 2 AM. A foreign tourist calls to confirm their reservation. The front desk is with another guest.
hoteluri-hospitality.description: Hospitality runs on first impressions. A guest who can't reach you at 2 AM starts their stay frustrated. Our agent handles reservations, check-in questions, FAQ, and after-hours calls — in Romanian and English — so every guest interaction starts on the right foot.

scenarios.title: Late-night reservation inquiry
scenarios.description: The agent provides room availability, prices, and amenities, and offers to complete the booking or transfer to an online form.

scenarios.title: Check-in question from a guest arriving late
scenarios.description: The agent confirms the reservation, explains late check-in procedures, and provides access instructions — all without waking the night manager.

scenarios.title: Guest calling about hotel facilities
scenarios.description: The agent answers questions about breakfast hours, parking, pool, Wi-Fi, and nearby attractions — the questions every front desk answers 20 times a day.

beforeAfter.before: Calls missed when front desk is occupied
beforeAfter.after: Every call answered, even at peak times

beforeAfter.before: International guests unable to reach the hotel
Staff interrupted by repetitive FAQ calls

features.title: Reservation handling
features.description: Takes reservation inquiries, provides availability and pricing, and directs to booking completion.

features.title: Multilingual support
features.description: Handles calls in Romanian and English — switches automatically based on the caller.

features.title: Guest FAQ
features.description: Answers the 20 most common guest questions — check-in time, parking, breakfast, facilities.

features.title: After-hours support
features.description: Covers the desk overnight and during peak periods so guests always reach someone.

objections.question: We already have a booking system online. Why do we need this?
objections.answer: Many guests prefer calling, especially international visitors or older guests. The agent captures those calls and directs them to complete the booking — rather than just losing them.

objections.question: What about complex reservation requests?
objections.answer: Standard reservations are handled directly. Special requests — group bookings, events, dietary needs — are noted and flagged for your team to follow up.

objections.question: Can it handle both Romanian and English guests?
objections.answer: Yes. The agent detects the caller's language and responds accordingly. Romanian first, English if needed.

hoteluri-hospitality.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
hoteluri-hospitality.roiDescription: With 25 calls per day and 30% missed, you're losing 7–8 potential booking inquiries daily. At €180 average nightly rate, even recovering 1–2 bookings per day pays for the agent many times over.
hoteluri-hospitality.roiResult: Two recovered bookings per day covers the entire monthly plan cost.
hoteluri-hospitality.pricingDescription: Hotels typically choose Professional or Premium for multilingual support, CRM integration, and detailed reporting.
hoteluri-hospitality.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
hoteluri-hospitality.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a hotel guest calling to confirm a reservation late at night.

consultanti-imigrare.name: Immigration Consultants
consultanti-imigrare.shortDesc: Visa information, consultation booking, document triage.
consultanti-imigrare.hero: A client calls asking about visas. You're in a consultation. Lost.
consultanti-imigrare.scenarioIntro: It's Wednesday at 2 PM. You're in a consultation with a client. The phone rings 6 times with visa questions.
consultanti-imigrare.description: Immigration clients are often stressed, confused, and on tight deadlines. When they call you and get no answer, they don't wait — they call the next consultant. Our agent handles visa inquiries, collects case details, and books consultations so you capture every lead while you're working with other clients.

scenarios.title: Client asking about visa requirements
scenarios.description: The agent explains general visa types and requirements for common destinations, provides an overview of your services, and books a consultation for specific advice.

scenarios.title: Urgent call about a visa deadline
scenarios.description: The agent captures the urgency, collects key details, and books the earliest available consultation — flagging it as priority.

scenarios.title: Client asking about required documents
scenarios.description: The agent explains the standard document checklist for common case types and schedules a consultation for a complete document review.

beforeAfter.before: Stressed clients going to other consultants
beforeAfter.after: Client reassured and booked before hanging up

beforeAfter.before: Repetitive visa FAQ calls taking your time
No after-hours coverage for urgent cases

stats.label: recovered case pays for months of service

consultanti-imigrare.featuresTitle: What your immigration consultant agent does

features.title: Visa information FAQ
features.description: Answers general questions about visa types, requirements, and timelines for common destinations.

features.title: Consultation booking
features.description: Books initial and follow-up consultations directly in your calendar.

features.title: Document checklist info
features.description: Explains standard document requirements for common case types.

features.title: Urgency triage
features.description: Identifies deadline-sensitive cases and prioritizes them in your schedule.

objections.question: Immigration law changes frequently. How does the agent stay current?
objections.answer: The agent is trained on the information you provide and updated whenever you need. It stays within scope — general guidance and booking. It never gives legal opinions.

objections.question: Clients need reassurance. Can an AI provide that?
objections.answer: The agent is warm, calm, and professional. It acknowledges concerns, provides clear information, and books a real consultation with you. That combination is reassuring.

objections.question: What if the caller speaks a language I don't support?
objections.answer: The agent handles Romanian and English natively. For other languages, it politely explains the languages available and offers to book a consultation with a translator.

consultanti-imigrare.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
consultanti-imigrare.roiDescription: With 10 calls per day and 35% missed, you're losing 3–4 potential clients daily. At €800 average case value, one recovered case per week pays for the agent for months.
consultanti-imigrare.roiResult: One recovered case per week covers the full annual Professional plan cost.
consultanti-imigrare.pricingDescription: Immigration consultants typically start with Professional for calendar integration and call recordings.
consultanti-imigrare.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
consultanti-imigrare.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a client calling an immigration consultant with urgent visa questions.

notariate.name: Notary Offices
notariate.shortDesc: Document appointments, document reminders, procedure information.
notariate.hero: A client calls for a notarial deed. You're busy. The phone rings 4 times. No one answers.
notariate.scenarioIntro: It's Thursday at 11 AM. You have 3 consecutive authentications. The phone rings between them.
notariate.description: Notary offices handle time-sensitive documents where clients have strict deadlines — property transactions, inheritance, contracts. When they can't reach you, they go to another notary. Our agent books appointments, explains document requirements, and handles procedure questions — so clients choose you and stay organized.

scenarios.title: Client calling to book a property deed
scenarios.description: The agent explains what documents are required, checks your availability, and books the appointment — sending a confirmation with the document checklist.

scenarios.title: Client asking about inheritance procedure
scenarios.description: The agent explains the general process and required documents for an inheritance case, and books an initial consultation.

scenarios.title: Client confirming their appointment details
scenarios.description: The agent confirms the date, time, and document requirements — reducing the chance of clients arriving unprepared.

beforeAfter.before: Clients with deadlines going to another notary

beforeAfter.after: Automatic document checklist sent at booking

beforeAfter.before: Repetitive procedure questions taking staff time

features.title: Appointment booking
features.description: Books all notarial services directly in your schedule — deeds, authentications, inheritance, contracts.

features.title: Document requirements
features.description: Explains what documents clients need to bring for each type of notarial act.

features.title: Procedure information
features.description: Answers common questions about notarial procedures, timelines, and fees.

features.title: Appointment confirmations
features.description: Sends clients confirmation with document checklist to ensure they arrive prepared.

objections.question: Notarial matters require precision. Can an AI be trusted?
objections.answer: The agent handles scheduling and information, not legal acts. It's precise about what it says and what it doesn't. For anything requiring notarial judgment, it books a consultation with you.

objections.question: What if a client has a complex case with many documents?
objections.answer: The agent collects the case type and details, provides the standard checklist, and flags complex cases for you to follow up with specific requirements.

objections.question: We have strict hours. Can the agent work within them?
objections.answer: The agent books within your defined working hours. For after-hours calls, it explains your hours, takes a message, and ensures you follow up the next morning.

notariate.roiTitle: How much do you get back?
notariate.roiDescription: With 12 calls per day and 35% missed, you're losing 4 potential clients daily. At €280 average deed value, that's over €1,000 per day in missed revenue.
notariate.roiResult: Recovering 3 extra bookings per day covers the monthly plan cost many times over.
notariate.pricingDescription: Notary offices typically start with Starter or Professional depending on volume and integration needs.
notariate.demoTitle: Hear what your agent sounds like
notariate.demoDescription: Listen to a demo call simulating a client booking a property deed appointment at a notary office.
